property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/Users/Palaniappan RM/.gemini/antigravity-ide/bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Programs\mongosh;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Packages\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.11_qbz5n2kfra8p0\LocalCache\local-packages\Python311\Scripts;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\ghcup\bin;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;C:\Users\Palaniappan RM\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.

testcase.name: dumpAivenData
testcase.system-out:
=== CONNECTING TO AIVEN SQL === Connected successfully!
--- TABLE: users --- id contact_number email full_name password password_reset_allowed password_reset_granted_at role username manager_id 1 Test Manager (Full Control) $2a$10$bHX1WyUxF6L3LF3UJW7g6eohMKIaepUnbXtX6IkeE5/31AQ2bwGga 0 null ROLE_ADMIN generalmanager null 4 +91 8754457732 careerschoolhr2@gmail.com Krishnakumar $2a$10$yW/JKxy5XUidXsoBbEYluOr7XVQgp7wXPUEvOMhWo5ipz/8WwR1ae 0 null ROLE_MANAGER Krishna null 8 +91 7904923601 careerschoolhr14@gmail.com Ganesh Venkatesan $2a$10$USJDHX9xGRRsyc3toL1nbOjzW8koW2mDIkGJMb0sj4A3ITNuvotQ6 0 null ROLE_MANAGER Ganesh null 9 +91 8838048345 careerschoolhr8@gmail.com Sandhya Chejarla $2a$10$/nwboBPyYY9siijRivgM0eKpXWvFER9nsFxnR/y1JqiFjyt3reawK 0 null ROLE_EMPLOYEE Sandhya 4 Total rows: 4
--- TABLE: tasks --- id created_date description due_date last_updated_date on_hold_requested priority status title assigned_by_id assigned_to_id 7 2026-07-09 07:53:04.229903 co ordinate with L&D & TA team to take pics and videos of CTS drive 2026-07-11 10:59:00 2026-07-14 06:31:45.005686 0 HIGH COMPLETED Capture CTS drive Photos 4 4 12 2026-07-09 11:03:17.938653 Travel and Accomodation expenses has to be done for Beebjan, Total - 2,018/- 2026-07-10 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:32:13.075168 0 MEDIUM COMPLETED Reimbursement 8 8 13 2026-07-09 11:05:28.925938 Billing confirmation mail has to be sent to Ienergizer for one candidate 2026-07-10 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:32:05.099132 0 HIGH COMPLETED TA Billing 8 8 14 2026-07-09 12:41:10.254496 ICC for DM intern - Saisrikar 2026-07-10 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:31:57.217363 0 MEDIUM COMPLETED Internship Completion Certificate 8 8 15 2026-07-09 12:42:03.895883 CCC for MITS College 3rd batch students 2026-07-10 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:31:49.122574 0 MEDIUM COMPLETED Course Completion Certificate 8 8 16 2026-07-09 13:34:48.863473 Prepare a design for common pamphlet with careerschool jobs and trainings especially for Walkin drive distributions. 2026-07-09 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:31:36.684251 0 HIGH COMPLETED Common Pamphlet 4 4 17 2026-07-09 13:35:58.042731 Prepare a awareness poster for fakejobs, backdoor jobs or no charges for jobs
Poster size: A2 2026-07-09 23:59:00 2026-07-10 04:35:56.503557 0 HIGH OVERDUE Backdoor Jobs Awareness Poster 4 4 18 2026-07-10 04:38:46.299050 Order has to be place for pamphlet to divyashree printers and get quotation 2026-07-10 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:31:37.656773 0 HIGH COMPLETED Pamphlets 8 8 19 2026-07-10 04:39:21.879417 Get approval and do recharge for Sravan's sim card 2026-07-10 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:30:38.259284 0 MEDIUM COMPLETED Recharge 8 8 20 2026-07-14 06:33:59.082478 Prepare and post 2nd CTS drive photos in social media 2026-07-11 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:34:07.400194 0 HIGH COMPLETED CTS Drive 2 Post 4 4 21 2026-07-14 06:34:59.827724 Prepare a HR Freshers Walkin Drive poster for circulation 2026-07-13 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:35:06.911948 0 HIGH COMPLETED HR freshers Drive Poster 4 4 22 2026-07-14 06:35:58.812610 Upload new drive pics and photos in the google my business page 2026-07-13 23:59:00 2026-07-14 06:36:05.899076 0 MEDIUM COMPLETED GMB SEO 4 4 24 2026-07-15 06:02:59.769798 Prepare a Email Campaign for DA Lead gen 2026-07-14 13:00:00 2026-07-15 06:03:35.214706 0 MEDIUM OVERDUE DA Email Campaign 4 4 Total rows: 13
